_finding: The EXTERNAL-DELETE axis of the D-370 lazy-segment unjustify law (probed 2026-07-21 after the tour-QA session built this shape API-side and saw retraction in a refocus-contaminated variant): an external delete of the LAST justifying premise lands as the same frozen staged delete as the RHS-delete g-cells - static + starved + unlinked keeps the belief on BOTH sides (T3(7) survives to session end; the binding's synchronous delete-cascade correctly excludes it). Extends the g-grid (pr_nl_g0..g11) to the external-op landing. API-side flip matrix measured the same session: no_loop+unlinked survives (g11 arm); a fresh premise that re-activates the setFocus kick refocuses the group and drains the old staged delete (g2/g8 arm - the shape that masquerades as 'D-370 not reproduced'); linked+static+starved keeps both beliefs (g10 arm).
drl:
rule "R3"
when
    T1()
    T2()
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
rule "R4"
salience 1
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1()
    $p : T2($v : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new T3($v));
end
name: pr_nl_g12_extdel_starved
